'''鈭歴-l-k''' ('''kasalak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whiskeyize|whiskeyize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-l-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whiskeyize|whiskeyize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-l-k
|-
! Lemma
| kasalak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisalak|thisalak]] || [[word:jisalak|jisalak]] || [[word:shisalak|shisalak]] || [[word:kisalak|kisalak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusalak|thuthusalak]] || [[word:jujusalak|jujusalak]] || [[word:shushusalak|shushusalak]] || [[word:kukusalak|kukusalak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusalak|thusalak]] || [[word:jusalak|jusalak]] || [[word:shusalak|shusalak]] || [[word:kusalak|kusalak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusalak|thusalak]] || [[word:jusalak|jusalak]] || [[word:shusalak|shusalak]] || [[word:kusalak|kusalak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesalak|thesalak]] || [[word:jesalak|jesalak]] || [[word:shesalak|shesalak]] || [[word:kesalak|kesalak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosalak|thothosalak]] || [[word:jojosalak|jojosalak]] || [[word:shoshosalak|shoshosalak]] || [[word:kokosalak|kokosalak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosalak|thosalak]] || [[word:josalak|josalak]] || [[word:shosalak|shosalak]] || [[word:kosalak|kosalak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosalak|thosalak]] || [[word:josalak|josalak]] || [[word:shosalak|shosalak]] || [[word:kosalak|kosalak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙salak|th忙salak]] || [[word:j忙salak|j忙salak]] || [[word:sh忙salak|sh忙salak]] || [[word:k忙salak|k忙salak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasalak|thathasalak]] || [[word:jajasalak|jajasalak]] || [[word:shashasalak|shashasalak]] || [[word:kakasalak|kakasalak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasalak|thasalak]] || [[word:jasalak|jasalak]] || [[word:shasalak|shasalak]] || [[word:kasalak|kasalak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasalak|thasalak]] || [[word:jasalak|jasalak]] || [[word:shasalak|shasalak]] || [[word:kasalak|kasalak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasalak|shasalak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasalak|goshasalak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasalak|gokishasalak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasalakn眉|shasalakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasalaknkn眉|goshasalaknkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasalakn眉|gokishasalakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasalaksh毛|shasalaksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasalaknksh毛|goshasalaknksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasalaksh毛|gokishasalaksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasalakro|shasalakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasalaknkro|goshasalaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasalakro|gokishasalakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasalakmu|shasalakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasalaknkmu|goshasalaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasalakmu|gokishasalakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasalaksher|shasalaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasalaknksher|goshasalaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasalaksher|gokishasalaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasalakng|shasalakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasalaknkng|goshasalaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasalakng|gokishasalakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasalakya|shasalakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasalaknkya|goshasalaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasalakya|gokishasalakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasalakyam|shasalakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasalaknkyam|goshasalaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasalakyam|gokishasalakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasalakn眉sh毛|shasalakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasalaknkn眉sh毛|goshasalaknkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasalakn眉sh毛|gokishasalakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasalakn眉ro|shasalakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasalaknkn眉ro|goshasalaknkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasalakn眉ro|gokishasalakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasalakn眉mu|shasalakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasalaknkn眉mu|goshasalaknkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasalakn眉mu|gokishasalakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasalaksh毛n眉|shasalaksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasalaknksh毛n眉|goshasalaknksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasalaksh毛n眉|gokishasalaksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasalaksh毛ro|shasalaksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasalaknksh毛ro|goshasalaknksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasalaksh毛ro|gokishasalaksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasalaksh毛mu|shasalaksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasalaknksh毛mu|goshasalaknksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasalaksh毛mu|gokishasalaksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasalakron眉|shasalakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasalaknkron眉|goshasalaknkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasalakron眉|gokishasalakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasalakrosh毛|shasalakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasalaknkrosh毛|goshasalaknkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasalakrosh毛|gokishasalakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasalakromu|shasalakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasalaknkromu|goshasalaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasalakromu|gokishasalakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasalakmun眉|shasalakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasalaknkmun眉|goshasalaknkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasalakmun眉|gokishasalakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasalakmush毛|shasalakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasalaknkmush毛|goshasalaknkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasalakmush毛|gokishasalakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasalakmuro|shasalakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasalaknkmuro|goshasalaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasalakmuro|gokishasalakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
